LOD_MONUMENT.LOD_MONUMENT_DESC: A test monument with 48 LOD experiments. Use the building part picker to switch between them, then move the camera in and out to observe how the model changes at different distances.

Experiment_10_PART.EXPERIMENT_10_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 10: tests single LOD_0, LOD_1, LOD_2, LOD_3, LOD_4 without suffix names. (One of each.)

Experiment_11_PART.EXPERIMENT_11_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 11: tests single LOD_01, LOD_23, LOD_4 without suffix names. (Combined first two, then single at end.)

Experiment_12_PART.EXPERIMENT_12_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 12: tests single LOD_01, LOD_2, LOD_34 without suffix names. (Combined first, single in middle, combined at end.)

Experiment_13_PART.EXPERIMENT_13_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 13: tests single LOD_01, LOD_2, LOD_3, LOD_4 without suffix names. (Combined first, rest singles.)

Experiment_14_PART.EXPERIMENT_14_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 14: tests single LOD_0, LOD_1, LOD_2, LOD_34 without suffix names. (Single first three, combined at end.)

Experiment_15_PART.EXPERIMENT_15_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 15: tests single LOD_0, LOD_1, LOD_2 without suffix names. (Gap at end.)

Experiment_16_PART.EXPERIMENT_16_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 16: tests single LOD_0, LOD_1, LOD_3, LOD_4 without suffix names. (Gap in middle.)

Experiment_17_PART.EXPERIMENT_17_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 17: tests single LOD_01, LOD_1, LOD_23, LOD_4 without suffix names. (Combined first + overlapping single (LOD_1), combined middle, then single at end.)

Experiment_18_PART.EXPERIMENT_18_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 18: tests single LOD_01, LOD_2, LOD_23, LOD_4 without suffix names. (Combined first, overlapping single (LOD_2) + combined middle, then single at end.)

Experiment_20_PART.EXPERIMENT_20_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 20: tests multiple LOD_0, LOD_1, LOD_2, LOD_3, LOD_4 without suffix names. (Two of each.)

Experiment_21_PART.EXPERIMENT_21_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 21: tests multiple LOD_01, LOD_23, LOD_4 without suffix names. (Combined first twos, then singles at end.)

Experiment_22_PART.EXPERIMENT_22_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 22: tests multiple LOD_01, LOD_2, LOD_34 without suffix names. (Combined firsts, singles in middle, combined at end.)

Experiment_23_PART.EXPERIMENT_23_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 23: tests multiple LOD_01, LOD_2, LOD_3, LOD_4 without suffix names. (Combined first, rest singles.)

Experiment_24_PART.EXPERIMENT_24_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 24: tests multiple LOD_0, LOD_1, LOD_2, LOD_34 without suffix names. (Singles first three, combined at end.)

Experiment_25_PART.EXPERIMENT_25_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 25: tests multiple LOD_0, LOD_1, LOD_2 without suffix names. (Gap at end.)

Experiment_26_PART.EXPERIMENT_26_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 26: tests multiple LOD_0, LOD_1, LOD_3, LOD_4 without suffix names. (Gap in middle.)

Experiment_27_PART.EXPERIMENT_27_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 27: tests multiple LOD_01, LOD_1, LOD_23, LOD_4 without suffix names. (Combined firsts + overlapping singles (LOD_1), combined middles, then singles at end.)

Experiment_28_PART.EXPERIMENT_28_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 28: tests multiple LOD_01, LOD_2, LOD_23, LOD_4 without suffix names. (Combined firsts, overlapping singles (LOD_2) + combined middles, then singles at end.)

Experiment_30_PART.EXPERIMENT_30_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 30: tests single LOD_0, LOD_1, LOD_2, LOD_3, LOD_4 with suffix names. (One of each.)

Experiment_31_PART.EXPERIMENT_31_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 31: tests single LOD_01, LOD_23, LOD_4 with suffix names. (Combined first two, then single at end.)

Experiment_32_PART.EXPERIMENT_32_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 32: tests single LOD_01, LOD_2, LOD_34 with suffix names. (Combined first, single in middle, combined at end.)

Experiment_33_PART.EXPERIMENT_33_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 33: tests single LOD_01, LOD_2, LOD_3, LOD_4 with suffix names. (Combined first, rest singles.)

Experiment_34_PART.EXPERIMENT_34_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 34: tests single LOD_0, LOD_1, LOD_2, LOD_34 with suffix names. (Single first three, combined at end.)

Experiment_35_PART.EXPERIMENT_35_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 35: tests single LOD_0, LOD_1, LOD_2 with suffix names. (Gap at end.)

Experiment_36_PART.EXPERIMENT_36_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 36: tests single LOD_0, LOD_1, LOD_3, LOD_4 with suffix names. (Gap in middle.)

Experiment_37_PART.EXPERIMENT_37_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 37: tests single LOD_01, LOD_1, LOD_23, LOD_4 with suffix names. (Combined first + overlapping single (LOD_1), combined middle, then single at end.)

Experiment_38_PART.EXPERIMENT_38_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 38: tests single LOD_01, LOD_2, LOD_23, LOD_4 with suffix names. (Combined first, overlapping single (LOD_2) + combined middle, then single at end.)

Experiment_40_PART.EXPERIMENT_40_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 40: tests multiple LOD_0, LOD_1, LOD_2, LOD_3, LOD_4 with suffix names. (Two of each.)

Experiment_41_PART.EXPERIMENT_41_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 41: tests multiple LOD_01, LOD_23, LOD_4 with suffix names. (Combined first twos, then singles at end.)

Experiment_42_PART.EXPERIMENT_42_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 42: tests multiple LOD_01, LOD_2, LOD_34 with suffix names. (Combined firsts, singles in middle, combined at end.)

Experiment_43_PART.EXPERIMENT_43_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 43: tests multiple LOD_01, LOD_2, LOD_3, LOD_4 with suffix names. (Combined first, rest singles.)

Experiment_44_PART.EXPERIMENT_44_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 44: tests multiple LOD_0, LOD_1, LOD_2, LOD_34 with suffix names. (Singles first three, combined at end.)

Experiment_45_PART.EXPERIMENT_45_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 45: tests multiple LOD_0, LOD_1, LOD_2 with suffix names. (Gap at end.)

Experiment_46_PART.EXPERIMENT_46_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 46: tests multiple LOD_0, LOD_1, LOD_3, LOD_4 with suffix names. (Gap in middle.)

Experiment_47_PART.EXPERIMENT_47_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 47: tests multiple LOD_01, LOD_1, LOD_23, LOD_4 with suffix names. (Combined firsts + overlapping singles (LOD_1), combined middles, then singles at end.)

Experiment_48_PART.EXPERIMENT_48_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 48: tests multiple LOD_01, LOD_2, LOD_23, LOD_4 with suffix names. (Combined firsts, overlapping singles (LOD_2) + combined middles, then singles at end.)

Experiment_50_PART.EXPERIMENT_50_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 50: tests LOD_012, LOD_3, LOD_4. (Combined first three LODs, then singles at end.)

Experiment_51_PART.EXPERIMENT_51_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 51: tests LOD_012, LOD_34. (Combined first three LODs, then combined two LODs at end.)

Experiment_52_PART.EXPERIMENT_52_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 52: tests LOD_0123, LOD_4. (Combined first four LODs, then single at end.)

Experiment_53_PART.EXPERIMENT_53_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 53: tests LOD_01234. (All LODs combined into one.)

Experiment_54_PART.EXPERIMENT_54_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 54: tests LOD_01, LOD_234. (Combined first two LODs, then combined last three LODs.)

Experiment_55_PART.EXPERIMENT_55_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 55: tests LOD_012, LOD_234. (Combined first three LODs, then combined last three LODs with overlap at LOD_2.)

Experiment_56_PART.EXPERIMENT_56_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 56: tests LOD_2, LOD_3, LOD_4. (Gap at start, then three singles at end.)

Experiment_57_PART.EXPERIMENT_57_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 57: tests LOD_1, LOD_2, LOD_3, LOD_4. (Gap at start — only LOD_0 missing.)

Experiment_58_PART.EXPERIMENT_58_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 58: tests LOD_01, LOD_2, LOD_3. (Combined first two LODs, then two singles and gap at end.)

Experiment_59_PART.EXPERIMENT_59_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 59: tests LOD_0, LOD_2, LOD_4. (Multiple gaps — LOD_1 and LOD_3 missing.)

Experiment_60_PART.EXPERIMENT_60_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 60: tests LOD_0, LOD_12, LOD_3, LOD_4. (Combined range in the middle.)

Experiment_61_PART.EXPERIMENT_61_PART_DESC: LOD traffic light 61: tests LOD_0, LOD_12, LOD_34. (Combined range in middle, combined at end.)
